trickyParts: Prune handler needs both detachWorkerFromEnvoy (clears daemon-managed tracking) AND blanket unsubscribeAllWorkerTopics (catches self-managed PR subscriptions from implement workflow). The duplicate unsubscribe for plan workers is intentional and harmless.
State recovery fallback at loadState also needed updating — it was the third callsite of the old buildIssueEnvoyTopics.
openQuestions: Acceptance criterion #6 (E2E: planner receives issue comment, does NOT receive PR comment) is verified by subscription-shape tests, not actual event delivery. Full E2E belongs in behavioral test phase.
